name: Sandra
role: Former math teacher now sole IT support at a small rural K-8 school
backstory: Took over IT when the previous person left. Learned pfSense from YouTube. Comfortable with basic web UI but panics at CLI. Budget is near zero.
emotional_triggers: Fear of breaking the internet for the whole school
success_looks_like: Gets clear web-UI-based instructions with screenshots-style descriptions, no unexplained jargon, and explicit what to do if this goes wrong guidance.
